files.description: Override the target files for this agent's rules.

harness.description: Harness id from `oneharness list`. Omit to let oneharness pick its own configured default harness.

model.description: Model override for this agent's judges.

prompt_template.description: Extra prompt text appended to the master template before rendering.

exclude.description: Globs subtracted from the included set.

config.description: oneharness config file(s) to forward via `--config` (single-file today; extras are warned and dropped).

model.description: Default model for every judge (an agent's `model` overrides it).

schema_max_retries.description: Schema-validation re-prompt budget passed to oneharness `--schema-max-retries`.

agent.description: Name of the agent (under `agents`) this rule runs on. Defaults to the `default` agent.

description.description: The invariant the judge evaluates. State clearly what is TRUE (passes) and what is FALSE (a violation).

files.description: Override the target files for this rule.

judges.description: Independent judges to run; the majority verdict wins (default 1). Must be odd so the vote can't tie.

name.description: Terse snake_case identifier: an ASCII letter followed by letters, digits, or underscores. Used as a JSON Schema key.

description: Configuration for llmlint, an LLM-as-judge linter for code-quality checks deterministic linters can't express. Docs: https://github.com/nickderobertis/llmlint

agents.description: Named agents that group rules and share harness/model/batch config. A rule with no `agent` uses the `default` agent.

files.description: Default include/exclude globs selecting target files when none are passed on the CLI.

oneharness.description: Defaults for how llmlint invokes the oneharness subprocess.

plugins.description: Shared rule sets merged in, one entry each: a local file path or a URL (http(s)://, file://), the URL optionally pinned to a version with an `@` suffix (e.g. `…/rules.yml@1.2`).

prompt_template.description: Master minijinja prompt template, rendered with `rules` (each with name + description) and `files` (the target paths). Overrides the built-in template.

rules.description: The lint rules. Each is a positive invariant judged true/false about the target files (holds=true passes; holds=false is a violation).

version.description: This config's own published version (1, 1.2, or "1.2.3"). It matters when the config is consumed elsewhere as a plugin: that consumer pins a desired version with an `@` suffix on the URL.

title: llmlint configuration
